reviews.comment:
Hace 2 meses me chocó un asegurado de ACA , a los 15 días  ya la aseguradora la caja les había enviado el dinero para indemnizar los daños  ya van casi 2 meses y aún no me pagan  como hice el reclamo en defensa del consumidor ahora me hicieron el trámite directamente por la aseguradora la caja y tengo que seguir esperando 10 días hábiles más , que hacen los vivos meten la plata a plazo fijo y generan intereses a su favor y te tienen esperando 1 , 2 o 3 meses para pagarte

(Translated by Google)
Two months ago, I was hit by someone insured by ACA. Fifteen days later, the insurance company, La Caja, sent them the money to compensate for the damages. It's been almost two months now, and they still haven't paid me. Since I filed a complaint with the consumer protection agency, they're now processing it directly through La Caja, and I have to wait another 10 business days. What are these crooks doing? They put the money in a fixed-term deposit, generate interest in their favor, and keep you waiting one, two, or three months to get paid.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MVlpRURBEAE
